content.title: Sort Into Folders of X
content.short_description: Distributes files into numbered subfolders based on quantity.
content.description: This PowerShell utility automates file organization by sorting files from a source directory into numbered subfolders based on a specified quantity per folder. The script recursively processes all files in a given directory and distributes them evenly across sequentially numbered folders, making it ideal for managing large collections of files that need to be batched into manageable groups.
content.role: I developed a complete PowerShell automation script that provides interactive file organization capabilities. The implementation includes user input validation, recursive file discovery, dynamic folder creation, and efficient file movement operations. I also compiled the script into an executable for easier distribution and use.

achievements: Provides automated file organization that saves significant manual sorting time
Enables efficient management of large file collections through batching
Offers a simple, user-friendly command-line interface for non-technical users
Reduces human error in file organization tasks

screenshots: Command-line interface demonstration showing user input prompts
Before/after directory structure showing file organization
Example of numbered folder creation with distributed files
